narrative:
Palmyra Township has 1,909 registered voters, with 56.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 27.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 16.7%, a clear Republican lean of 10.5 percentage points.
